Patch Set 1:

Hi Vijay, I think we can merge it temporary with staging tag. Unfortunately v.2.1.10  is not working correctly, see https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/dcaegen2/services/pm-mapper/+/128169/1

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Hi Vijay, I think we can merge it temporary with staging tag. Unfortunately v.2.1.10  is not working correctly, see https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/dcaegen2/services/pm-mapper/+/128169/1

Hi Tomasz - The error with released tag/2.1.10 doesnt seem certificate related - any idea on why that test failed?  

The staging image is okay for time-being to get the current failure resolved, however the staging image is temporal is nature (will get purged from nexus3 in few weeks). Hence 128169 should be continued to looked at (or change to newer dmaap container version if available)

It is certificates and release issue - I am sure. I compare container v2.1.10 and v2.1.10-STAGING-latest. and container v2.1.10 still has expired certificates. Jira with description was created https://jira.onap.org/browse/DMAAP-1728

okay, thanks for creating the jira Tomasz; will proceed to merge this as temporary work around. And lets keep https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/dcaegen2/services/pm-mapper/+/128169 to align with new DMAAP image (2.1.11?) once it is available
